title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Album of the Year Final Odds and Predictions
text: According to Gold Derby's final predictions, Bad Bunny's DTMF leads with 44% odds to win Album of the Year. The Puerto Rican artist faces competition from several strong contenders including Justin Bieber with Swag, Sabrina Carpenter with Man's Best Friend, Clipse with Let God Sort Em Out, Lady Gaga with Mayhem, Kendrick Lamar with GNX, Leon Thomas with Mutt, and Tyler, the Creator with Chromakopia. Bad Bunny is favored to win, especially given his already-big 2026 momentum, including his scheduled Super Bowl halftime performance. The competition includes last year's major winner Kendrick Lamar, making this category particularly competitive among hip-hop and pop-influenced albums. Betting markets showed significant activity on prediction platform Kalshi with over 1.5 million in market volume. Bettors had Bad Bunny at 71 cents for Yes shares, with the album dominating global charts and sparking record-breaking performances.
